title: Sample Project
author: Luke Zaruba
short_description: A sample project demonstrating the gallery layout.
long_description: This is a fake project used as a placeholder to demonstrate the gallery layout and functionality. It includes multiple tags and a description to show how content will be displayed in the dialog.
